name: @quoin/tokens-gestalt
description: Pinterest Gestalt design tokens translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Pinterest Gestalt 'light' tokens. Pinterest red (#E60023 family) drives accent. Gestalt has explicit semantic background-default / background-tertiary / text-default / text-subtle tokens that map cleanly. Pinterest Sans is proprietary; referenced by family name only.
